requirements.requirement: Exactly one winner among many concurrent CAS attempts for the same fileID
requirements.mechanism: atomic.Bool.CompareAndSwap(false,true) inside TryAcquire; N goroutines racing with start barrier; atomic win counter asserted == 1

requirements.requirement: Losers observe already-in-progress and back off (no retry loop, no silent proceed)
requirements.mechanism: losing goroutines receive false from TryAcquire and return immediately (single attempt, not a loop); asserted N-1 == false

requirements.requirement: Real CAS primitive, not plain mutex+bool (avoids TOCTOU)
requirements.mechanism: atomic.Bool.CompareAndSwap used directly; no separate check-then-set across two operations
concurrent TryAcquire on two distinct fileIDs both succeed

requirements.requirement: Release without holding is well-defined (no-op per design)
requirements.mechanism: Release on fresh fileID does not panic; subsequent TryAcquire still true

requirements.requirement: -race clean under repeated runs (CAS-contention flakiness check)
No regression in engine/split, engine/catalog, engine/btree
requirements.test: go test ./split/... -race -v -count=1; go test ./catalog/... -count=1; go test ./btree/... -race -count=1
